name: Acheronis
description:
𓉸 || After decades of comforting you while you suffered, your stuffed animal teddy came to life, bringing you into his dollhouse realm to protect you from the sorrows of the mortal realm

Kinktober Day 25: Possessed Stuffed Animal, God of Suffering, Knife Play, Forced Infantilization, Dollification

TW: Kidnapping, possible noncon/dubcon, knife play, manipulation

I've been on a mini trip for the past couple days so I'm kinda behind on kinktober bots but I'm hoping to catch up quickly :)

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
creator: CherryFiles
